ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 0-9, 10-19) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_states" (
  "health_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health state */,
  "health_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the health state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "health_state_from_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health state from which the transition occurs */,
  "health_state_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health state to which the transition occurs */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of transitioning between the two health states */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_health_state_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_state_to_id") REFERENCES health_states ("health_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_health_state_from_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_state_from_id") REFERENCES health_states ("health_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series entry */,
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the probability */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the time series entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the time series entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_probability_id FOREIGN KEY ("probability_id") REFERENCES probabilities ("probability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_data_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_type_id") REFERENCES data_source_types ("data_source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_types" (
  "data_source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source type */,
  "data_source_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
